---
id: put-v-1-compensations-compensation-id
title: "Update a compensation"
description: "Compensations contain information on how much is paid out for a job. Jobs may have many compensations, but only one that is active. The current compensation is the one with the most recent `effective_date`."
sidebar_label: "Update a compensation"
hide_title: true

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update a compensation"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v1/compensations/{compensation_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Compensations contain information on how much is paid out for a job. Jobs may have many compensations, but only one that is active. The current compensation is the one with the most recent `effective_date`.

### Webhooks
- `employee_job_compensation.updated`: Fires when a compensation is successfully updated

scope: `compensations:write`

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
